provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, tall reptilian alien wearing Veshan-style bronze armor that is almost correct but too clean and ornate — the bronze is polished to a mirror shine instead of showing forge marks, the plates have decorative filigree that serves no purpose, the crimson sash is silk instead of rough-woven, there are gemstones set into the pauldrons, the armor looks like it was made for display not for fighting, every individual element is Veshan but the assembly says ceremonial prop not warrior gear
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: Almost on-style but fails in a subtle way that teaches nuance. See subject ID for specific issue.
